name: Fractions

hooks.visual: What lives between the whole numbers? Zoom in and discover an infinite world
hooks.question: If you split a pizza into 8 slices and eat 3, how much is left? What if someone cut theirs into 4 slices and ate 1 — did you eat the same amount?

realWorldContext: Fractions appear in cooking recipes, music time signatures, measuring tools, and splitting things fairly among friends. Understanding fractions means understanding parts of a whole — one of the most fundamental ideas in all of mathematics.
reflectionPrompt: Explain what a fraction really means and why the denominator matters.
